description: HTML source code for a web-based database visualizer interface, including embedded CSS styles and JavaScript for dynamic interaction with backend APIs to list databases, tables, and display table data.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of available databases from the backend API and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases, resetting current selections and updating UI.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses a database entry in the sidebar and loads its tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays the list of tables within the selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches data for a selected table and renders it in the main content area.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Generates HTML for table display based on fetched data.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Creates table cell HTML, handling different data types and content overflow.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses a cell to show full content for long or object data.
